description: This satellite image captures an example of a sandy beach at Sudersand, Sweden, taken on 2012-08-22 by the SPOT-5 satellite using a 1/2/3 Band Combination. The image depicts the turquoise-green sea at the bottom, a white to light beige sandy beach along the coastline, and a dense band of dark green forest immediately inland. Further away from the coast, the landscape transitions into a mix of agricultural fields (lighter green/brown patches), scattered buildings, and thin grey lines representing roads. A small green circle containing a white dot is visible on the sandy beach. The image source is CNES 2011©, Distribution Airbus DS/Spot Image.
